summary: Review round 6 (verify fix-round 4, TEST-002): selectNode/deselect now refresh edge-pin handles via positionEdgeHandles(computePorts()) — correct, null-safe on deselect, not a hot path (discrete events; computePorts already per-frame during drags), guarded by 1 new unit test + 2 de-annotated e2e regressions. REV-006 fully closed cross-track (real-browser FR6 group-drag + FR7 pin e2e delivered, incl. parallel-edge REV-007 tests). All 8 prior REV verified; 1 new nit (REV-009: stale e2e comments). 301 unit + 62 e2e green. Verdict clean.
